title: Speaker at FOSS Backstage
content:
A couple of weeks ago I had the pleasure of speaking at FOSS Backstage. The topic was the same as at CfgMgmtCamp, to use open tools in open source projects, but I had the opportunity to fine-tune the slides and pracice more. The entire talk, titled “FOSS behind the scenes – the center stage is not enough” is embedded below, and the slides are available at aina.li/backstage2026.

Wikidata talk

In a moment of spontaneity at the conference I submitted a lightning talk, this time on the topic of using Wikidata in apps: “Using content from Wikidata in your apps“. The slides in this talk are based on a set by Lydia Pintscher.

Do you want a talk?
